name: Create Basketball Playbook
description: A high school basketball coach needs a digital playbook. Create a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart containing a 'Half Court Setup' page with a half-court diagram (large rectangle, key rectangle, and hoop circle), an 'Offensive Starters' page with labels for PG, SG, SF, PF, and C, and a 'Pick and Roll' page featuring labels 'O1', 'X1', and 'Screen' with a movement indicator line or arrow. Save the file as /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/basketball_playbook.flipchart.
